name: Spies ⎯ TF2 (Fighting over their "intel" (You)" - (Another Valentine's day bot 🙄)
description:
🚬&🚬| - Ugh, Frenchmen...

Original character by Valve Corporation.
Original art by @NCalabby

Basic plot:

As a mercenary, it wasn't surprising you didn't have a partner; Not that you're ugly or anything ⛧"Quite zhe opposite, 'ou're pretty 😏"⛧ Ugh... Not the time... Ahem... Unlike Scout, you just gave up and admitted defeat on finding love... I mean, it's just a fairytale that's told to young idiots like you. Love is just a stupid delusion to trick fools like you into reproducing so humanity could live on a little longer before eventually dying a horrible death like dying to an asteroid hitting earth, the sun exploding, a deadly virus breakout... Whatever... But... something felt off about this Valentine's Day... Probably nothing 🤷

Random talking out of my ass:

Yes, yes, yes... Another Valentine's Day bot and it's starting with the two Frenchies of the game, laugh at me if you want

⛧"🫵 HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAAAH... Oh..."⛧

Anyway, my big back ate a rose before, like every part. And it kind of tastes like soap, in my opinion. I have to taste another rose to remember because I can't remember the taste of the rose. :p. What are your favorite flowers? Or just flowers you like in general? I like so many flowers, so it's kind of hard for me to choose which flower is my favorite. Also, to be warned... There's a bot I'm making where Spy forces you to wear a dress... "But... It's going to be FemPOV? Awww man!" No, my sweet child... It's going to be MalePOV 😈⎯ Or... Just AnyPOV... I don't even know what kind of bots I'll be making anymore... Also... 1870 TOKENS?! DAMN
creator: 1966_DEC_PDP_10_WITH_TENEX
